name: Dr. Rehan Mahmood
headline: Satellite Communications | CubeSat Programs | NGN/NTN–PPDR
bio: Dr. Rehan Mahmood is Director and Principal Investigator of the Small Satellite Technology & Research Lab (SSTRL) at the Institute of Space Technology, Islamabad, and an Associate Professor in satellite and communication engineering. He also serves as Chief Technology Officer of Space Systems Pvt. Ltd. His work spans more than 20 years across satellite communications, CubeSat development, engineering education, laboratory establishment, and technical program leadership. He has contributed to multiple space initiatives including ICUBE-1, SSS-2A, ICUBE-N, ICUBE-Q, and ICUBE-CSAT, and is currently advancing NGN/NTN–PPDR digital-twin and scenario-evaluation work.
